titleStmt.title: SII 38.557: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 557. (A.R. No. 557 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the south wall, Chakravartti-Tirumagaṉ shrine, same temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkravarttin Vīrarājēndrachōḻa 1277 A.D. Year 33, Kaṟkaṭaka, śu. di. 10. Wednesday, Uttiram, 17th July 1210 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records the (assignment) of ten vēli of land, as dēvadāna by (the chief) Pañchanadivāṇa Nīlagaṅgaraiyaṉ Nallanāyaṉ alias Chōḻagaṅgadēvaṉ at Aṇaikkaraichchēri alias Chōḻagaṅgadēvanallūr to the god Nakkanāyanār of (the village) Pammal. It is stated that the above village Aṇaikkaraichchēri, (wherein the gifted land was situated) was obtained as kāṇi by a certain Vaḷattuvāḻvittār, son of Tiruvaṇṇāmalai-uḍaiyāṉ alias Ayyanaṅgāṟappiramarāyar, who is also described as one of the Āriyars, from the sabhaiyār of Nallūr alias Chōḻanaṉbach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Mēṉmāṅgāṭṭu-nāḍu in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam.
Evidently the chief Nīlagaṅgaraiyaṉ made this gift of land after purchase from Vaḷattuvāḻvittār, though this is not explicitly stated in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirarājentira coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 33vatu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu daśamiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu(ṉa)nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattup puliyūrkoṭṭattu meṉmāṅkāṭṭu nāṭṭu nallūrāṉa coḻanaṉpaccaturveti maṅ
kalattup piṭākaiyā r capaiyār pakkal Āriyaril tiruvaṇṇāmalaiyuṭaiyāṉāṉa Aiyyanaṅkāṟap piramārāyar makaṉ vaḷattu vāḻvittār koṇṭuuṭaiyak kāṇi Aṇaikkaraicceri Āṉa coḻakaṅkatevanallūril Uṭaiyār pammal nakkanāyanārkkut tevatāṉamāka nā
yanār coḻakaṅka te sa nilam pattu velikku kiḻpārkkellai coṟuṭaiyāṉ ceri Ellaikkum naṭuvil taṇṭukaraikku meṟkku kiḻāyṉetta muḷpaṭavum teṉpāṟkkellai naṭuvil ciṟṟoṭaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellai karumāṉtāṅkalukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ūrnatta
ttukku teṟkkum Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭu Uḷpaṭṭa mikutik kuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭaṅka nilam pattuveliyum tevatāṉamāka Iṭṭom pañcanativāṇa nilakaṅkaraiyaṉ nallanāyanāṉa coḻakaṅka tevaṉeṉ Ivai coḻakaṅkatevaṉ Eḻuttu § Ittaṉmattukku vikitam coṉṉār Uṇṭākil keṅ
kaik karaiyil kurāṟpacuvai koṉṟāṉ pāvam koḷḷak kaṭavaṉ § śrīmāheśvararakṣaiḥ—
Digital edition of SII 38.557 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
